title: isonandra perakensis var. kelantanensis
intro: Isonandra perakensis var. kelantanensis is a rare and lesser-known plant species, commonly classified under the family Sapotaceae. It is also known as Kelantan Isonandra. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Traditional herbal preparations of Isonandra perakensis var. kelantanensis include infusions and decoctions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and antimicrobial properties.
